issues.description: Text states '[Opponent's Turn]' condition but DSL uses 'OnAttacked' trigger. Should use 'Trigger' with duration 'DuringOpponentTurn' to represent passive ability active during opponent's turn.

Passive ability during opponent's turn should have duration 'DuringOpponentTurn', not 'EndOfTurn'. '[Opponent's Turn]' text indicates the effect is active while it is opponent's turn, not a one-time effect ending at turn end.
Condition only checks if Leader exists on board. Must verify Leader has {East Blue} type. Should be 'LeaderHasType' with type 'East Blue'.
Condition only checks if Leader exists on board. Must verify Leader has {East Blue} type. Should be 'LeaderHasType' with type 'East Blue'.
